channel.title: Emerald Pointe – Tide & Wind Conditions
channel.description: Daily marine forecast with tide & wind info for Punta Gorda

item.title: Marine Conditions for Wednesday, February 25
item.description: 🌊 High Tide: 08:25 PM (1.663 ft) ··· 🌊 Low Tide: 04:48 AM (-0.439 ft) ··· 💨 Wind: SW 12 mph
